languages.text:
While this obelisk is present, the Chronomancer receives 1 stack of {g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}Obelisk-Protected{/g}.
Upon destruction, this obelisk deals Direct damage equal to 5% maximum Wounds to all Necrons in combat.

traits.locale_text:
As long as this obelisk is intact, the Chronomancer gains 1 stack of {g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}obelisk-protected{/g}.
When destructed, this obelisk deals direct damage to all Necrons equal to 5% of their maximum wounds.

As long as this obelisk is intact, the Chronomancer gains +1 stack of {g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}obelisk-protected{/g}.
When destroyed, this obelisk deals direct damage to all Necrons equal to 5% of their maximum wounds.

languages.text:
Пока этот обелиск не уничтожен, хрономант получает +1 уровень эффекта {g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}хранимый обелиском{/g}.
При уничтожении этот обелиск наносит всем некронам {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}прямой урон{/g}, равный 5% от их {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}максимального здоровья{/g}.

languages.text:
Solange dieser Obelisk steht, erhält der Chronomant +1 Stapel {g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}Obeliskschutz{/g}.
Wird er zerstört, fügt dieser Obelisk allen Necrons {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}Direktschaden{/g} in Höhe von 5 % seiner {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maximalen Wunden{/g} zu.

languages.text:
Mientras el obelisco esté en pie, el Cronomante obtiene +1 acumulación de {g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}protección del obelisco{/g}.
Cuando se destruye, el obelisco inflige {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}daño directo{/g} a todos los Necrones igual al 5 % de sus respectivas {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}heridas máximas{/g}.

languages.text:
Kronobaz, bu dikili taş ayakta kaldığı sürece +1 {g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}dikili taş korumasında{/g} birikimi kazanır.
Bu dikili taş, imha edildiğinde tüm Nekronlara {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}maksimum sağlık{/g} puanlarının %5'i kadar {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}doğrudan hasar{/g} verir.

languages.text:
方尖碑矗立时，编时匠获得1层{g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}方尖碑所护{/g}。
方尖碑被摧毁时，对所有太空死灵造成等同于太空死灵5%{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大生命值{/g}的{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直击伤害{/g}。

languages.text:
Tant que cet obélisque reste debout, le chronomancien gagne +1 cumul d'{g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}Obélisque protecteur{/g}.
À sa destruction, l'obélisque inflige des {g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}dégâts directs{/g} à tous les Nécrons à hauteur de 5 % de leurs {g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}blessures maximums{/g}.

languages.text:
このオベリスクが立っている限り、クロノマンサーは{g|f:c3b38d719f744d56ad27b8cf48c8ef1d}オベリスクの保護{/g}のスタックを+1増やす。
破壊されると、このオベリスクはネクロンの{g|Encyclopedia:MaxWounds}最大HP{/g}の5%の{g|Encyclopedia:DirectDamage}直接ダメージ{/g}を与える。
